title: ulex boivinii var. webbianus
intro: Ulex boivinii var. webbianus, also known as the rock gorse or mountain gorse, is a variety of flowering shrub that belongs to the genus Ulex in the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat gastrointestinal issues and as a diuretic. The health benefits associated with Ulex boivinii var. webbianus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of arthritis, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for use in traditional medicine, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
